title: calamagrostis nivicola
intro: Calamagrostis nivicola, also known as mountain fescue or snow grass, is a perennial grass native to mountainous regions in North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Calamagrostis nivicola include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate respiratory issues.
